topPlaces.name: Tiware dam failure
topPlaces.description: On 2 July 2019, the Tiware dam in Ratnagiri district of Maharashtra state of India failed following heavy rains. The failure resulted in flooding of the villages situated downstream.

items.note: On 2 July 2019, the Tiware dam in Ratnagiri district of Maharashtra state of India failed following heavy rains. The failure resulted in flooding of the villages situated downstream.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Vasota Fort?
faq.a: The best time to visit Vasota Fort is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Vasota Fort?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Pune Airport (105 km) and the nearest railway station is Pune Junction (98 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Vasota Fort?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Vasota Fort at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Vasota Fort?
faq.a: Stays in Vasota Fort start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Vasota Fort?
faq.a: The top attractions are Tiware dam failure.
